blockingIssues.description: Prior review still applies: direct/runtime Store auto-registration behavior must be validated against the implemented code paths, not only metadata surfaces or manual registration tests.
Prior review still applies: generated metadata/default-config surface must be demonstrably consumed by runtime behavior to satisfy the feature description.

Current validator run found cargo clippy failing on core/src/crypto.rs with clippy::type_complexity for AUTO_CRYPTO_REGISTRY and clippy::needless_borrow in register_model_crypto_fields, so milestone validators are not currently green.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify scrutiny/rust worker procedures for verification-only or inherited-code sessions so workers must verify claimed behavior against actual source and validator outputs, not only prior handoffs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 1 reviews found claimed runtime behavior mismatches; round 2 also found the current workspace still fails clippy despite test and check passing.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a library note claiming SECURE_FIELDS contains fully resolved default service/account values.
rejectedObservations.reason: wrong: reviewer evidence still shows metadata preserving explicit overrides rather than resolved defaults.
